_instructions: TURN-BASED / PUZZLE GAME EXAMPLE. This shows how to configure a turn-based game (like Sokoban, match-3, puzzle). Instead of position/velocity, we monitor game state (moves remaining, score, level). Read your actual GameState or PuzzleManager script.

invariants.note: Moves left should never go negative; should be bounded
Score should never decrease during a level
Level should stay within game bounds
Piece count should stay in bounds (depends on board size)
